sentences.arabic: رَأَى يُوسُفُ عَجُوزًا يَحْمِلُ أَشْيَاءَ ثَقِيلَةً.
sentences.translation: Jusuf je vidio starca koji nosi teške stvari.
sentences.translationEn: Youssef saw an old man carrying heavy things.

sentences.arabic: اقْتَرَبَ مِنْهُ وَسَأَلَهُ إِنْ كَانَ يَحْتَاجُ مُسَاعَدَةً.
sentences.translation: Prišao mu je i pitao treba li pomoć.
sentences.translationEn: He approached him and asked if he needed help.

sentences.translation: Starac je prihvatio i puno zahvalio Jusufu.
sentences.translationEn: The old man accepted and thanked Youssef a lot.

sentences.arabic: حَمَلَ يُوسُفُ الأَشْيَاءَ حَتَّى بَابِ البَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Jusuf je nosio stvari do vrata kuće.
sentences.translationEn: Youssef carried the things to the door of the house.

sentences.translation: Osjetio se sretan što je pomogao osobi.
sentences.translationEn: He felt happy because he helped someone.
